note: Cross-reference stamp (HK-12/PROD-26): first STAMP of a family tagged since scope-v1 — pre-existing tags v1..v6 are frozen history, the stamp starts asserting at v7 (contracts.md §3: no version exists that is not in a stamp, from the first stamp onward). v7.1 = additive block release: ships the new contract-triad pinned block (process/claude-blocks/contract-triad.md; blocks version with scope tags per HK-2 single-pin) — script bytes unchanged from v7. artifacts is drift-checked: the vendored script must be byte-identical to the tag; consumers track their vendored tag via their .repin.toml [[tool]] manifest. v7.2 (IMPL-9): rotation bug fix — the DATED pattern demanded the date flush against the heading marks, so ##-style journals (commons) parsed as zero sections and --rotate refused; block text unchanged from v7.1.
